description: A2 readiness surface for cross-backbone summarizer evaluation.

profiles.label: deepseek_cli_default
profiles.notes: Uses the local `deepseek` CLI path already exercised by the current runs.

profiles.label: openai_default
profiles.notes: Generic OpenAI-compatible profile. Suitable when a GPT-style model is exposed through a standard chat-completions endpoint.

profiles.label: gpt_openai_profile
profiles.notes: Dedicated GPT-profile alias so A2 can report a named non-DeepSeek backbone separately from the default profile.

profiles.label: qwen_openai_profile
profiles.notes: Dedicated Qwen-profile alias for a second non-DeepSeek backbone.

profiles.label: llama_openai_profile
profiles.notes: Dedicated Llama-profile alias for an additional non-DeepSeek backbone.

verdict.note: The repo can now route to non-DeepSeek backends, but fewer than two named alternative profiles are configured.
